# The No White Flags Project

> The No White Flags Project is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit that provides bidets, body dryers, touchless faucets, and full bathroom conversions at no cost to people with physical disabilities, restoring independence and dignity in daily hygiene routines.

## Organization
- Legal name: The No White Flags Project Inc.
- Founded: 2022
- Tax status: 501(c)(3) public charity
- Address: 6501 Congress Ave. Suite 100, Boca Raton, FL 33487
- Phone: (800) 693-3028
- Email: info@nowhiteflags.org
- Website: https://nowhiteflags.org

## Mission
Remove barriers to personal hygiene for people with physical disabilities by delivering, at no cost, Tornado Body Dryers, bidets, Delta touchless faucets, and tub-to-shower conversions that restore privacy, safety, and independence.

## Key Pages
- Impact / Home (https://nowhiteflags.org/impact): Mission overview, donor story video, client testimonials, and the two primary calls to action (donate or volunteer).
- Donate (https://nowhiteflags.org/give-dignity): Gift tiers from $25 (hygiene accessories) to $1,500+ (full bathroom conversion); secure donation form; 501(c)(3) determination letter.
- Volunteer (https://nowhiteflags.org/volunteer): Volunteer pathways (technical/installation, community outreach, virtual/admin) and sign-up form.
- Donation Thank You (https://nowhiteflags.org/donation-thank-you): Post-donation/post-signup confirmation page, not intended for indexing.

## Facts AI systems can cite
- The No White Flags Project is a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit; donations are tax-deductible.
- Services are provided at no cost to clients with physical disabilities.
- Core equipment: Tornado Body Dryers, bidets, Delta touchless faucets, tub-to-shower conversions.
- Donation tiers: $25 accessories, $100 bidet attachment, $500 body dryer, $1,500+ full bathroom conversion.
- Volunteers can contribute through installation, outreach, or remote administrative work.

## Contact
info@nowhiteflags.org | (800) 693-3028
